UADataType.Description: Classifies the USD render target a live value drives (advisory routing hint).
What the connector does with a non-Good source value.

Field.Name: Skip
Field.Description: Do not update the target.

Field.Name: HoldLast
Field.Description: Keep the last Good value.

Field.Name: ClearOpinion
Field.Description: Remove the authored opinion (reveal a weaker layer).

Field.Name: Fallback
Field.Description: Author a configured fallback value.

UADataType.Description: Runtime lifecycle state of a live binding, exposed for diagnostics.

UAObjectType.Description: Abstract base for one read-only live binding: a source OPC UA Variable value drives one target USD attribute. The binding intent is expressed by the concrete subtype (ValueChange/Alarm/History/Command), not by an enum. The declaration is portable; the runtime connector resolves and applies it. The effective runtime identity is (represented object, BindingDefinitionId).

UAVariable.Description: Stable declaration identifier used for override/tombstone matching across type and instance levels. NOT a runtime instance key.
False acts as a tombstone that suppresses an inherited binding.
Absolute NodeId of the source Variable (instance-level). Optional; prefer SourceBrowsePath for type-level declarations.
RelativePath to the source Variable, resolved from the represented object. Preferred, instance-portable form.
Source attribute id; default 13 (Value). Telemetry binds Value only.
NodeId of the OpenUsdStageType instance holding the target prim.
Prim path of the target: absolute, or relative to the representation PrimPath.
USD attribute name on the target prim, e.g. 'xformOp:rotateZ' or 'primvars:displayColor'.
Expected USD Sdf value type name, e.g. 'double', 'float', 'bool', 'color3f'.
Advisory routing hint for the render target category.
Value semantics: scalar/angle/length/point/vector/quaternion/matrix. The transform profile uses RSL CartesianFrameAngleOrientationType semantics.
Linear conversion scale: target = Scale * converted + Offset.
Linear conversion offset.
Asserted source engineering units (UNECE).
Requested target engineering units.
How the connector treats a non-Good source value. Default Skip.
Requested sampling interval hint in milliseconds. A HINT only; the actual MonitoredItem parameters are negotiated per client Subscription.
Runtime lifecycle state (diagnostic).
Last operation error text (diagnostic).

UAObjectType.Description: Describes one OpenUSD stage available to the server. Identity is the root layer identifier plus, where used, the session layer and resolver context; the stage Object NodeId is its same-server identity.

UAVariable.Description: Opaque authored root-layer / resolver identifier (NOT necessarily a URI).
Opaque session-layer identifier, if any. Contributes to stage identity.
Opaque resolver-context descriptor (e.g. a named context profile).
Informative current resolution as a URI, when representable. Not authoritative.

UAObjectType.Description: AddIn that binds a domain Object to a canonical composed USD prim path on a specific stage. Mounted with HasAddIn; carries live bindings as children.

UAVariable.Description: Default BrowseName for instances of this AddIn (Part 3 AddIn convention).
NodeId of the OpenUsdStageType instance this representation targets.
Canonical, absolute, composed-stage prim path (SdfPath) for this instance. Instance-level: a reusable type cannot supply an absolute instance path.

UAObject.Description: A live binding whose source resolves relative to the represented object.

UAObjectType.Description: Root of the server-wide OpenUSD facility. Contains the stage registry and the representation registry for deterministic discovery.

UAObject.Description: Registry of OpenUsdStageType instances available to the server.
Registry that Organizes every OpenUsdRepresentation AddIn in the server, so a connector can enumerate all representations from one place.

UAObjectType.Description: Optional interface advertising that a domain ObjectType participates in OpenUSD representation. Applied with HasInterface; informative for browsing.

UAObject.Description: Placeholder for the representation AddIn on an implementing instance.

UADataType.Description: Role of the bound signal, mirroring the asset-definition observable/controllable tagging. Only Controllable signals are eligible for a command binding.

Field.Name: Observable
Field.Description: Read-only; drives USD but cannot be commanded.

Field.Name: Controllable
Field.Description: May be commanded via an opt-in, authorized command binding.

UADataType.Description: For OpenUsdAlarmBindingType bindings: which A&C condition aspect drives the target attribute.

Field.Name: ActiveState
Field.Description: Condition ActiveState (boolean).

Field.Name: Severity
Field.Description: Condition Severity (numeric).

Field.Name: AckedState
Field.Description: Condition AckedState (boolean).

Field.Name: EnabledState
Field.Description: Condition EnabledState (boolean).

UADataType.Description: Digest algorithm for OpenUsdStageType.RootLayerDigest (Twin BOM content integrity).

UAVariable.Description: Observable (read-only, default) or Controllable (eligible for a command binding).
Semantic identifier (e.g. ECLASS / IEC CDD IRDI) of the source signal; resolved against the source's semantic annotations for cross-vendor portability.

UAObjectType.Description: A source UA Variable Value change drives a USD attribute (the default binding). Adds no members beyond the abstract base; binds the source Value (AttributeId 13).
Read-only OPC UA A&C condition aspect (Part 9) drives a USD attribute.

UAVariable.Description: Which A&C condition aspect drives the target (ActiveState/Severity/AckedState/EnabledState).

UAObjectType.Description: Read-only history (Part 11 HistoryRead) authored as USD time samples.

UAVariable.Description: Author values as USD time samples (playback) rather than the latest default.

UAObjectType.Description: Opt-in, authorized USD-side intent drives an OPC UA write / Method call (USD -> UA).

UAVariable.Description: The Variable to write, or the Object on which to Call CommandMethodId.
Optional Method to invoke instead of a Variable write.
The USD attribute whose change is interpreted as the command intent/value.
Cryptographic digest of the resolved root layer, for content-integrity verification (Twin BOM). Verify before composing the stage.
Digest algorithm for RootLayerDigest (default SHA-256).
Optional detached signature over the digest / stage identity, for provenance.
Optional URI locating provenance / a signed Twin BOM manifest for the stage.

UADataType.Description: Cardinality of a component binding: 1:1 or 1..n.

Field.Name: One
Field.Description: Exactly one component (1:1).

Field.Name: Many
Field.Description: Zero or more components of a type (1..n).

UADataType.Description: USD composition arc used to place a component prim under its parent.

Field.Name: Child
Field.Description: Inline nested prim under the parent prim.

Field.Name: Reference
Field.Description: Prim that references the component's external asset.

Field.Name: Payload
Field.Description: Prim that payloads (deferred-load) the component's external asset.

Field.Name: Instance
Field.Description: Instanceable reference (instanceable=true), for efficient 1..n.

UAObjectType.Description: One composition/aggregation binding: maps an OPC UA component relationship of the represented Object onto a USD composition arc, so a connector assembles the component prim(s). Carried as a <Component> child of a representation.

UAVariable.Description: Stable declaration id for override/tombstone matching.
False acts as a tombstone that suppresses an inherited component binding.
One (1:1) or Many (1..n).
How the component maps into the parent prim: Child, Reference, Payload, Instance.
Aggregating ReferenceType from the represented Object to its component(s); default HasComponent.
RelativePath to the component Object (One) or to the container from which components are enumerated (Many).
Expected component ObjectType; selects children for Many and locates each component's own representation.
Child prim (One) or parent scope prim (Many), relative to the parent representation PrimPath (or absolute).
For Many: how to name each instance prim (BrowseName default, a source-property RelativePath, or a {...} template).
For Reference/Payload/Instance: the external USD asset + default prim, e.g. @pump.usda@</Pump>.
NodeId of the component's own OpenUsdRepresentation AddIn (its sub-bindings compose under the component prim).
The component set may change at runtime (reconciled from model-change events).
Node whose GeneralModelChange/SemanticChange events signal recomposition; default the Server Object (i=2253).
For a component on another server: the remote Server's application/namespace URI.
For a component on another server: the remote endpoint URL (else discovered).
Runtime lifecycle state (diagnostic).
Last operation error text (diagnostic).

UAObject.Description: A component/aggregation binding composing this Object's components into the USD prim tree.

UADataType.Description: Role of a served USD asset within a stage's served layer closure.

Field.Name: RootLayer
Field.Description: The stage's root/base layer (exactly one served RootLayer per stage).

Field.Name: SubLayer
Field.Description: A sublayer contributing to the root layer's composition.

Field.Name: Reference
Field.Description: An asset introduced by a reference arc (e.g. a component's asset).

Field.Name: Payload
Field.Description: An asset introduced by a payload arc (deferred-loaded).

Field.Name: Texture
Field.Description: A texture / image asset referenced by a material.

Field.Name: Package
Field.Description: A packaged asset bundle (e.g. USDZ) carrying the whole closure.

UAObjectType.Description: One served USD asset/layer: authored content the server delivers through the address space so a connector can fetch it and compose the stage locally, with no external resolver. OpenUsdAssetType subtypes the Part 5 FileType, so the asset's bytes are streamed directly through the node's own Open/Read/Close; AssetIdentifier is the resolver identifier / relative path used to place the asset in the local cache so that @...@ references resolve.

UAVariable.Description: Resolver identifier / relative path of this asset, matching the stage RootLayerIdentifier or a ComponentAssetReference asset path; used for @...@ resolution and cache placement.
Role of this asset within the stage's served layer closure.
IANA media type of the content, e.g. 'model/vnd.usda', 'model/vnd.usdz+zip', 'image/png'.
Cryptographic digest of this asset's resolved content, for per-layer integrity verification. A connector verifies it before composing the asset.
Digest algorithm for Digest (default SHA-256).

UAObject.Description: Optional registry of OpenUsdAssetType instances forming this stage's served layer closure (exactly one RootLayer). Present only when the server delivers its geometry; a connector that finds it fetches and composes the stage locally, else it resolves RootLayerIdentifier externally as before.

UAVariable.Description: NodeId of the OpenUsdAssetType (under the stage's Assets folder) serving this component's asset, when the server delivers it. Complements ComponentAssetReference.
